changes: Replaced entire 484-line SKILL.md with focused 100-line version targeting python-pptx only
Removed html2pptx workflow that caused devstral-small to fail (wrong pptxgenjs API, wasted all steps debugging)
Added explicit python-pptx code patterns for creation, extraction, and editing
Added concrete examples for parsing numeric data from text (e.g. '$4.2M' -> 4.2)
Removed html2pptx.md, ooxml.md, scripts/, and ooxml/ directories (unreferenced by simplified skill)
Added NEVER use pptxgenjs/html2pptx constraint to prevent capability failures
